== Notes for [[Item:Q111806|Q111806]] ==

Daughter of https://www.geni.com/people/Ero-Fern%C3%A1ndez-conde-de-Lugo/6000000001412968233

feedback only from DIY online
*https://www.myheritage.it/names/santa_viegas%20%20el%20peropay

better source for under 1000 PLZ

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
